types.name: Gui
types.typeSummary: Dear ImGui immediate-mode UI (cimgui + raylib-cimgui); after scene/HUD, before EndDrawing.

methods.name: Setup
methods.summary: Initializes ImGui and the raylib backend (call once after window init).

methods.name: Shutdown
methods.summary: Shuts down ImGui and releases backend resources.

methods.name: NewFrame
methods.summary: Starts a new ImGui frame (call after BeginDrawing, before widgets).

methods.name: Render
methods.summary: Submits ImGui draw data to raylib (call after widgets, before EndDrawing).

methods.name: BeginWindow
methods.signature: bool BeginWindow(string title, ref bool open)
methods.summary: Begins an ImGui window; returns false when collapsed.

methods.name: Button
methods.summary: ImGui button; returns true when pressed.

methods.name: Checkbox
methods.signature: bool Checkbox(string label, ref bool value)
methods.summary: ImGui checkbox; returns true when toggled.

methods.name: Slider
methods.signature: bool Slider(string label, ref float value, float min, float max)

methods.name: SameLine
methods.summary: Continues layout on the same line.
